title: 千问云
abstract: 千问云 is a general-purpose LLM that handles conversation, content generation, analysis, and code. It is the closest thing to a full-stack team member you can run on a single machine.
abstract_zh: 伙儿！今天给大家安利个神器——**Qwen**！它可是个大模型效率小帮手，写周报时再也不怕文思枯竭，调Bug时也能秒速定位问题所在。不信？试试就知道！快来加入我们的队伍吧！🚀
